elements.name: TC556255 - Validate Location Bulk Assignment fields and assign location

steps.name: I login with username "george.parker" and password "Password123#"
I should see the dashboard
I navigate to Bulk Assignments via the ellipsis menu
I am on the Bulk Assignments page
I fill in search criteria and click Run Query
the Bulk Assignments list displays filtered records
I select 1 or more records
I click the Assign Location button
the Location Bulk Assignments modal displays
I verify Assignment Type is a required single select dropdown
I verify Location is a required single select dropdown
I verify Effective Start Date is a required date field
I verify Note field allows maximum 10000 characters
I fill in all required fields and click Continue
the Bulk Assignments list is NOT refreshed
previously selected records remain selected
I open the person profile for a selected person
I navigate to Location Assignment section
the assigned location appears in the persons location assignments
I cleanup the location assignment for the assigned person

I select 1 or more records

the staff assignment modal is visible
I verify Assignment Type is a required single select dropdown
I verify Staff Member dropdown is visible
I verify Location is a required single select dropdown
I verify Effective Start Date is a required date field
I verify Note field allows maximum 10000 characters
I verify Is Primary checkbox is visible
I fill in staff assignment form and submit
the Bulk Assignments list is NOT refreshed
previously selected records remain selected

the assigned staff appears in the persons staff assignments
I cleanup the staff assignment for the assigned person
